title: crotalaria involutifolia
intro: Crotalaria involutifolia, also known as the bush calotrope, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Crotalaria involutifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and support the immune system. Crotalaria involutifolia is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
